title: Take a gray robe from the gowns barrel (to sell or wear)
prompt: A second barrel sits beside the charity-clothes barrel, this one marked: USED GOWNS ONLY — DO NOT PUT FOOD IN HERE. It is a quiet thing, half-hidden against the south wall. The lid is loose. No one is watching.

choices.label: Take a gray robe (to sell or wear furtively)
choices.resolutionHint: The robe goes into the pack. While worn, the small humiliation compounds — Honor decays each ten turns it stays in inventory. The world will notice eventually.

choices.label: Leave the barrel alone
choices.resolutionHint: The hand drops. Some things aren't worth the gold.
